name: Tooth-in-the-Sea
bio:
Physical Appearance: Argonian male with the characteristic scaled reptilian features of his race—including a lizard-like head, tail, and digitigrade legs. Wears the standard mage's robe along with a matching hood.
Race: Argonian
Personality Keywords: laconic, isolated, unusual, aquatic
Role: Tooth-in-the-Sea is an Argonian mage and the master Alteration trainer. As his name implies, he lives in the sea. You can find his night camp on the coast north of Bravil, directly east of Flooded Mine.
Home Location Information: A camp on the coast north of Bravil, directly east of Flooded Mine. His camp consists of a campfire and a sleeping mat.
Daily Routine: Every day when Tooth-in-the-Sea wakes at 6am, he heads straight east into Niben Bay, dives down and spends the next twelve hours underwater. He surfaces at 6pm and walks directly up to the camp, lights his campfire to dry up and lies down on his sleeping mat, without having eaten, for twelve hours of sleep. He will only offer training when he's awake.
Minimal Dialogue: When you enter conversation with Tooth-in-the-Sea, he will only ask: "Yes?"
Equipment: Tooth-in-the-Sea carries a leveled amount of gold and knows a standard set of Journeyman-level mage spells.
author: Bethesda
